'''sharanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiggerman|jiggerman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiggerman|jiggerman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sharanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shærængæth|shærængæth]] || [[word:shærængæj|shærængæj]] || [[word:shærængæsh|shærængæsh]] || [[word:shærængæ|shærængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shararangath|shararangath]] || [[word:shararangaj|shararangaj]] || [[word:shararangash|shararangash]] || [[word:shararanga|shararanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sharangath|sharangath]] || [[word:sharangaj|sharangaj]] || [[word:sharangash|sharangash]] || [[word:sharanga|sharanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sharafngath|sharafngath]] || [[word:sharafngaj|sharafngaj]] || [[word:sharafngash|sharafngash]] || [[word:sharafngaf|sharafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sharangatha|sharangatha]] || [[word:sharangaja|sharangaja]] || [[word:sharangasha|sharangasha]] || [[word:sharangaka|sharangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sharangath|sharangath]] || [[word:sharangaj|sharangaj]] || [[word:sharangash|sharangash]] || [[word:sharanga|sharanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sharangathal|sharangathal]] || [[word:sharangajal|sharangajal]] || [[word:sharangashal|sharangashal]] || [[word:sharangakal|sharangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sharangathatha|sharangathatha]] || [[word:sharangajaja|sharangajaja]] || [[word:sharangashasha|sharangashasha]] || [[word:sharangaka|sharangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sharangathan|sharangathan]] || [[word:sharangajan|sharangajan]] || [[word:sharangashan|sharangashan]] || [[word:sharangakan|sharangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sharangathaoro|sharangathaoro]] || [[word:sharangajaoro|sharangajaoro]] || [[word:sharangashaoro|sharangashaoro]] || [[word:sharangakaoro|sharangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
